Project.NAME: ai-steward-wiki
Project.keywords: telegram, claude-code, wiki, multi-user, classifier, scheduler, sqlite, alembic, aiogram, async
Project.annotation: Isolated multi-user Telegram service that wraps Claude Code CLI as a personal WIKI assistant (Karpathy LLM Wiki method). Full module map: foundation (settings, logging), three-DB storage (jobs/audit/sessions), auth/onboarding/admin, scheduler core, Stage-0 classifier, Stage-1 wiki runner + lifecycle, inbox materialise + idempotency, ops (PII/retention, backup/git), Telegram I/O text layer, voice STT, photo ingest, ingest pipeline (classifier + streaming), runtime wiring.

M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.NAME: Settings
M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.purpose: Pydantic-settings BaseSettings (frozen) loaded from .env with AISW_ prefix.

type-Settings.PURPOSE: Frozen BaseSettings: log_level, workspace_root, claude_config_dir_local/_vps (resolved by env), *_db_url

type-LogLevel.PURPOSE: Literal alias for accepted log levels

M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.NAME: Logging
M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.purpose: structlog JSON-lines logging with correlation_id contextvar propagation.

fn-configure_logging.PURPOSE: One-shot structlog setup, JSON renderer, ISO UTC timestamps

fn-bind_correlation_id.PURPOSE: Set the correlation_id contextvar; returns Token

fn-reset_correlation_id.PURPOSE: Reset via Token returned from bind_correlation_id

M-AUTH-USERS.NAME: Auth / Users
M-AUTH-USERS.purpose: users.toml SSoT allowlist with SIGHUP+watchdog hot-reload and sessions.db sync (D-031, D-042).

type-UserRecord.PURPOSE: Frozen Pydantic model for one [[users]] entry

type-AllowlistReloader.PURPOSE: Guarded async reload coroutine; sha256 short-circuit

fn-replace_global.PURPOSE: Atomic swap of module-level allowlist cache

fn-sync_to_sessions_db.PURPOSE: Upsert + soft-disable for users absent from config

M-STORAGE.NAME: Storage barrel
M-STORAGE.purpose: Storage package root; re-exports apply_sqlite_pragmas plus SQLite PRAGMA listener.

fn-apply_sqlite_pragmas.PURPOSE: Attach connect-listener that sets WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, foreign_keys=ON, busy_timeout=5000

M-STORAGE-JOBS.NAME: Storage / jobs.db
M-STORAGE-JOBS.purpose: Async engine + ORM models + Pydantic discriminated union for jobs.db (D-002, D-006, D-014, D-019).

type-Job.PURPOSE: Row in jobs.jobs (flat columns + JSON payload)

M-STORAGE-AUDIT.NAME: Storage / audit.db
M-STORAGE-AUDIT.purpose: Append-only audit + dedup + observability for audit.db (D-006 amended 2026-05-10).

M-STORAGE-SESSIONS.NAME: Storage / sessions.db
M-STORAGE-SESSIONS.purpose: Runtime TG state and hot-path caches for sessions.db (D-006, D-031, D-042, D-030, D-023).

type-InboxHintCache.PURPOSE: Per-user runtime catalog of '## Inbox hint'

M-RUNTIME-WIRING.NAME: Runtime wiring / __main__
M-RUNTIME-WIRING.purpose: Process entrypoint (python -m ai_steward_wiki). Composes Settings, per-DB alembic migrations, engines, allowlist sync, APScheduler (incl. the daily media _staging sweep job), classifier+runner+output adapters, VoiceHandler/PhotoIngestor, aiogram Bot+Dispatcher; runs long-polling with graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown. The runner adapter promotes staged media into <wiki>/raw/media after a successful Stage-1 run (D-022).
M-RUNTIME-WIRING.depends: M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS, M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING, M-AUTH-USERS, M-STORAGE-JOBS, M-STORAGE-AUDIT, M-STORAGE-SESSIONS, M-SCHEDULER, M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0, M-WIKI-RUNNER, M-WIKI-LIFECYCLE, M-TG-TEXT, M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER, M-TG-VOICE, M-TG-PHOTO, M-INBOX, M-INBOX-ROUTER, M-INBOX-ROUTE, M-OPS-PII

fn-_sync_url_for_jobstore.PURPOSE: strip aiosqlite driver from URL for SQLAlchemyJobStore

fn-_ensure_data_dirs.PURPOSE: mkdir parents for sqlite file URLs

fn-_run_all_migrations.PURPOSE: alembic upgrade head per-DB via asyncio.to_thread

fn-_load_users_config.PURPOSE: load users.toml or return empty config when path missing

type-_RouterAdapter.PURPOSE: Inbox-WIKI Stage-1a router: ensure_inbox_wiki → stage raw payload → run_wiki_session in Inbox-WIKI/ → parse_router_reply; WikiRunnerError→RouterError (aisw-dsg)

fn-_render_raw_sidecar.PURPOSE: build (filename, content) for Inbox-WIKI/raw/<ts>_<source>.md — plain body for text, YAML front-matter + staged_path sidecar for media

type-_LibrarianAdapter.PURPOSE: Inbox-WIKI Stage-1b librarian: resolve_target_wiki → stage_raw_into_wiki → run_wiki_session in <Domain>-WIKI/ (wiki.md + domain overlay) → IngestOutcome; WikiRunnerError→run_failed (aisw-zd9)

M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.NAME: Telegram handlers wiring
M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.purpose: aiogram Router that adapts Telegram message/callback events (text/voice/photo/audio/video_note/document/callback) to a MessagePipeline, composed into the Dispatcher. audio and video_note route to on_voice (STT path); photo forwards message.caption; photos and image-documents are forwarded with media_paths.

fn-build_router.PURPOSE: factory wiring 7 aiogram handlers (text, voice, photo, audio, video_note, document, callback) to a MessagePipeline

M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.NAME: ClaudeCliCommon
M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.purpose: Pure-function primitives shared by Stage-0 (classifier) and Stage-1 (wiki) Claude CLI backends.

fn-build_env.PURPOSE: restricted env dict (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR + minimal PATH) for CLI subprocess

fn-neutral_cwd.PURPOSE: working directory that does NOT auto-discover project CLAUDE.md

fn-system_prompt_argv.PURPOSE: flag fragment --system-prompt-file <path> replacing default Claude Code system prompt

fn-truncate_stderr.PURPOSE: UTF-8 decode + length cap for error log lines

M-ONBOARD-ADMIN.NAME: Onboarding / Admin
M-ONBOARD-ADMIN.purpose: Unknown-telegram_id onboarding (pending_users CRUD + intro template) and admin surface — approve/reject pending users, elevation, shadow channel (D-028, D-030, D-031, D-032, D-042).

fn-start_unknown_user.PURPOSE: idempotent upsert returning the refreshed pending row

fn-purge_expired_pending.PURPOSE: delete pending rows past TTL; returns deleted count

type-ElevationToken.PURPOSE: frozen dataclass returned by elevate; default 30min window

M-SCHEDULER.NAME: Scheduler core
M-SCHEDULER.purpose: APScheduler AsyncIOScheduler factory (D-003), 5-lane priority queue, 3-tier WIKI lock manager, failure taxonomy + 3-strikes auto-disable, DLQ insert, SIGTERM→grace→SIGKILL kill sequence, periodic maintenance-job registration (D-019, D-021, D-022, D-030).

fn-kill_with_sequence.PURPOSE: SIGTERM, wait grace seconds, SIGKILL fallback (D-021)

fn-move_to_dlq.PURPOSE: persist a permanently-failed job into jobs.db.jobs_dlq (D-019)

fn-register_all_retention_jobs.PURPOSE: wire purge-expired-pending + media _staging sweep + retention jobs

type-WikiLockManager.PURPOSE: 3-tier acquire/release: semaphore → asyncio.Lock per WIKI → flock, stale-PID recovery

M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0.NAME: Classifier / Stage-0
M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0.purpose: Stage-0 Haiku intent classifier — prompt cache (semver+sha256), backend abstraction (Claude CLI default / Anthropic API optional / Fake), Pydantic intent schema, NL time parser (dateparser → Haiku-fallback → escalate) (D-009, D-010, D-013, D-015).

fn-classify.PURPOSE: Stage-0 orchestrator: backend call + Pydantic validation + audit upsert + structlog

fn-parse_time.PURPOSE: NL time parser: dateparser → Haiku-fallback → escalate (D-010)

type-Intent.PURPOSE: closed enum of Stage-0 intents (D-009, mapped to spec §3 job kinds)

type-ClassifierResult.PURPOSE: frozen Pydantic v2 result with intent/confidence/audit fields

type-TimeParseResult.PURPOSE: frozen Pydantic v2 NL-time result with when_utc + escalate flag

type-ClassifierBackend.PURPOSE: Protocol; ClaudeCliBackend default, AnthropicApiBackend optional, FakeClaudeRunner test double

type-Spawner.PURPOSE: subprocess spawn primitive seam (chunk 16 injects systemd-run prefix)

M-WIKI-RUNNER.NAME: WIKI / Stage-1 runner
M-WIKI-RUNNER.purpose: Stage-1a/1b Sonnet runner orchestrator — assemble prompt (base+overlay+per-WIKI CLAUDE.md), acquire WIKI lock, spawn `claude --output-format stream-json`, parse stream events, hard timeout + kill-sequence, aggregate assistant text (D-007, D-011, D-012, D-021).

fn-run_wiki_session.PURPOSE: public entrypoint orchestrating one Stage-1a/1b run

fn-assemble_prompt.PURPOSE: concat base+overlay (+per-WIKI CLAUDE.md if present) → atomic write

fn-aggregate_text.PURPOSE: extract assistant text from WikiRunResult.events (stream-json shapes)

fn-parse_stream_json.PURPOSE: async iterator over an asyncio.StreamReader → StreamEvent

type-WikiRunResult.PURPOSE: dataclass result of one run (run_id, exit_code, events, …)

type-StreamEvent.PURPOSE: frozen Pydantic v2 model for one stream-json line (type+payload)

type-Spawner.PURPOSE: Protocol; spawn(argv, env, cwd) → SpawnedProcess; AsyncioSpawner default

M-WIKI-LIFECYCLE.NAME: WIKI / lifecycle
M-WIKI-LIFECYCLE.purpose: WIKI name normalisation (Cyrillic→Latin ISO 9, PascalCase), owner-scoped create/lookup/soft-delete/restore with anti-spam cap + near-duplicate detection, CLAUDE.md frontmatter + managed/user-zone markers + template loader, 5-step pre-flight grounding (D-008, D-039, D-041).

fn-normalize_wiki_name.PURPOSE: raw NL string → WikiName (primary, hyphenated_lookup, slug)

type-AntiSpamCapError.PURPOSE: hard cap reached on wiki creation

type-Frontmatter.PURPOSE: CLAUDE.md frontmatter model; managed/user HTML zone markers

M-INBOX.NAME: Inbox-WIKI materialise + hint cache
M-INBOX.purpose: Per-user Inbox-WIKI/ first-contact materialise, "## Inbox hint" Markdown parser + sessions.inbox_hint_cache repo (stat→cache-hit hot path), media staging+promotion for voice/photo ingest (D-004, D-016, D-022).

fn-ensure_inbox_wiki.PURPOSE: idempotent first-contact materialise; returns Path to Inbox-WIKI dir

fn-extract_inbox_hint.PURPOSE: parse CLAUDE.md text, return trimmed '## Inbox hint' body or None

fn-get_or_refresh_hint.PURPOSE: hot-path helper: stat→cache-hit on (size,mtime) else read+sha256

fn-sweep_staging.PURPOSE: delete staging files older than ttl_s; returns removed count (D-022)

type-MediaRef.PURPOSE: dataclass (staging_path, sha256, mime, ext, size, run_id)

M-INBOX-ROUTER.NAME: Inbox-WIKI Stage-1a router reply parser
M-INBOX-ROUTER.purpose: Parse the Stage-1a Inbox-WIKI Router reply (a fenced ```router block) into a RouterDecision; tolerant — falls back to CLARIFY on a missing/malformed block (aisw-dsg, Inbox-WIKI Phase-A; D-004, D-016, prompts/inbox.md ≥1.1.0).

type-RouterIntent.PURPOSE: closed enum: route | create_wiki | clarify | reject

type-RouterDecision.PURPOSE: frozen Pydantic model (intent, target_wiki, notes, raw, parsed_ok)

type-RouterError.PURPOSE: raised by the runtime adapter when the Router CLI run fails unrecoverably

fn-parse_router_reply.PURPOSE: extract the last ```router block, parse key:value, normalise cross-field, fallback to CLARIFY

M-INBOX-ROUTE.NAME: Inbox-WIKI route+ingest helpers
M-INBOX-ROUTE.purpose: Resolve/create the target <Domain>-WIKI from a RouterDecision (lookup-or-create; AntiSpamCapError/WikiNameError → RouteRejection), stage the raw payload into it (write raw/<ts>_<source>.md + promote media via promote_path_to_raw), pick the Stage-1b domain overlay, build the librarian ingest prompt, and (Phase-C, aisw-e45) (de)serialise a route+ingest action to/from a JSON-able dict for the confirm-loop draft (aisw-zd9 Phase-B + aisw-e45 Phase-C; D-004, D-023, smart-inbox-routing).

type-RouteRejection.PURPOSE: cap / bad_name rejection with a ru hint

type-RouteAction.PURPOSE: a staged route+ingest action awaiting user confirmation (decision + user_text + source + media_paths + correlation_id) — Phase-C

fn-resolve_target_wiki.PURPOSE: lookup-or-create the target <Domain>-WIKI for the owner; ROUTE-missing → create + on_route_missing callback

fn-stage_raw_into_wiki.PURPOSE: write raw/<ts>_<source>.md + promote media into <wiki>/raw/media/ (skip already-gone media)

fn-pick_domain_overlay.PURPOSE: prompts/domain-<slug>.md if it exists else domain-default.md

fn-build_ingest_prompt.PURPOSE: ru Stage-1b ingest instruction referencing the raw path(s) + the user text

fn-route_action_to_payload.PURPOSE: serialise a RouteAction to a JSON-able dict for pending_confirms.draft_json (Phase-C)

fn-route_action_from_payload.PURPOSE: inverse: reconstruct a typed RouteAction (RouterDecision/Path) from the draft dict (Phase-C)

M-INGEST-IDEM.NAME: Ingest idempotency
M-INGEST-IDEM.purpose: Two-layer ingest dedup (D-018): L1 TG update_id (24h) + L2 SHA-256 content hash (30d) with NFKC text normalisation; records dedup outcomes into audit.db.

fn-normalize_text.PURPOSE: NFKC + strip + lower + collapse-whitespace for L2 text hashing

fn-compute_content_hash.PURPOSE: SHA-256 hex of normalized text or raw bytes per ContentKind

type-SeenFileMatch.PURPOSE: dataclass returned on L2 collision (hash + first-seen ts + owner)

M-OPS-PII.NAME: Ops / PII + retention
M-OPS-PII.purpose: Tiered PII redactor (NIST SP 800-122) for structlog + DB write paths, GDPR purge_user admin endpoint (allow-listed stores), APScheduler retention jobs implementing §10.4 retention table + _trash/_staging sweeps (D-034 §10.4).

type-PIIRedactor.PURPOSE: stateful redactor with HMAC secret + on/off toggles; make_structlog_processor adapter

fn-purge_user.PURPOSE: GDPR endpoint; admin-gated; allow-listed stores per D-034 §10.4

type-RetentionPolicy.PURPOSE: Pydantic v2 model declaring one §10.4 retention rule

fn-run_purge.PURPOSE: execute one retention policy; returns PurgeResult

fn-register_retention_jobs.PURPOSE: add all RETENTION_POLICIES to a scheduler

M-OPS-BACKUP.NAME: Ops / backup + per-WIKI git
M-OPS-BACKUP.purpose: Daily db_snapshot maintenance job (VACUUM INTO state/snapshots/<UTC>/ for jobs/audit/sessions, 7d rolling retention) and per-WIKI local git auto-commit helpers (D-037, tech-spec §10.2/§10.5).

fn-snapshot_databases.PURPOSE: run VACUUM INTO for each configured DB into per-day dir (0700)

fn-register_db_snapshot_job.PURPOSE: register cron 03:00 UTC daily db_snapshot job

fn-init_wiki_git.PURPOSE: idempotent git init + .gitignore writer per WIKI dir (D-037)

fn-auto_commit.PURPOSE: stage-all + commit; no-op when nothing staged

type-SnapshotResult.PURPOSE: Pydantic v2 frozen model with per-store outcomes

M-TG-TEXT.NAME: Telegram I/O text layer
M-TG-TEXT.purpose: aiogram 3 dispatcher + allowlist outer-middleware, graduated 3-tier confirmations (auto/implicit/explicit + 10min TTL), D-025 output-size hybrid policy (≤3500 inline / ≤10000 chain-split / >10000 summary) + persistence, D-026 HTML-balanced throttled streaming edits (D-023, D-024, D-025, D-026, D-031, D-042).

fn-build_bot.PURPOSE: construct aiogram.Bot with HTML default parse_mode

fn-deliver_output.PURPOSE: D-025 hybrid size policy + persistence; returns DeliveryReceipt

type-AiogramSender.PURPOSE: adapter wrapping aiogram.Bot to satisfy the TgSender Protocol

type-AllowlistMiddleware.PURPOSE: aiogram outer-middleware gating updates by telegram_id (D-031)

type-ConfirmationService.PURPOSE: graduated auto/implicit/explicit confirmation flow + 10min TTL (D-023); request_explicit takes a keyboard_factory (3-button default; route confirms pass build_route_confirm_keyboard)

fn-build_route_confirm_keyboard.PURPOSE: 2-button (Подтвердить/Отмена) inline keyboard for Inbox-WIKI route confirms (Phase-C, aisw-e45)

type-HtmlBalancer.PURPOSE: tokeniser-based open/close balancer for whitelisted TG HTML tags

type-ChainSplitter.PURPOSE: split text into ≤3 parts at semantic boundaries with (i/M) footer

type-StreamEditor.PURPOSE: D-026 throttled streaming edits: 1.5s OR Δ≥50 + chain-split at 4000 + final-flush

type-HaikuSummarizer.PURPOSE: Protocol for >10000-char summary path; LengthCapSummarizer safe fallback

M-TG-VOICE.NAME: Telegram / voice STT
M-TG-VOICE.purpose: Voice (ogg/opus) ingestion — faster-whisper CPU STT (CTranslate2 int8, ru/en, RTF ≤ 0.5) + staging hand-off (D-022, tech-spec §9). audio and video_note also route here.

type-FasterWhisperTranscriber.PURPOSE: default impl, lazy CTranslate2 int8 CPU model load, fallback lang ru

type-Transcript.PURPOSE: frozen dataclass (text, lang, duration_s, model, rtf)

type-VoiceUnavailableError.PURPOSE: raised when faster-whisper STT backend is missing

M-TG-PHOTO.NAME: Telegram / photo ingest
M-TG-PHOTO.purpose: Photo ingestion — stage bytes to _staging/, return a MediaRef; photos (and image-documents) run Claude vision via the wiki pipeline (D-022, tech-spec §9).

type-PhotoIngestor.PURPOSE: stages photo bytes; returns MediaRef for the wiki pipeline

type-PHOTO_MIME_TO_EXT.PURPOSE: closed mapping of allowed photo MIME types → extension

M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER.NAME: Ingest pipeline / classify→run→deliver
M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER.purpose: DefaultPipeline coordinator over already-built ingest blocks — L1/L2 dedup, Stage-0 classify → Stage-1 run → deliver_output; voice transcript path; photo→vision via media_paths; document mime router (PDF text extract, size cap); Inbox-WIKI routing: a ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI RouterDecision is proposed via an inline-button route confirm (persisted as a route_ingest pending row) and the Stage-1b move+ingest runs in on_confirm_callback on "confirmed" (Phase-C, aisw-e45); Russian safe-fallback acks (chunk 20, D-022, D-023).
M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER.depends: M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0, M-WIKI-RUNNER, M-TG-TEXT, M-INGEST-IDEM, M-TG-VOICE, M-TG-PHOTO, M-INBOX, M-INBOX-ROUTER, M-INBOX-ROUTE

type-MessagePipeline.PURPOSE: Protocol for the 5 handler entry points (on_text/on_voice/on_photo/on_document/on_confirm_callback)

type-Router.PURPOSE: narrow Inbox-WIKI Stage-1a router wrapper Protocol (aisw-dsg); intercepts WIKI_INGEST/WIKI_QUERY/UNKNOWN

type-Librarian.PURPOSE: narrow Inbox-WIKI Stage-1b librarian wrapper Protocol (aisw-zd9); executes ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI → IngestOutcome

type-IngestOutcome.PURPOSE: frozen dataclass returned by Librarian.ingest (status ok|rejected|run_failed, reply, run_id, target_wiki, created)

type-WikiRunner.PURPOSE: narrow Stage-1a/1b wrapper Protocol; WikiRunOutcome result dataclass

M-TG-PIPELINE-STREAMING.NAME: Ingest pipeline / slow-path streaming
M-TG-PIPELINE-STREAMING.purpose: DefaultStreamingDelivery — race the Stage-1 run against a short timer; on slow runs post a placeholder and feed buffered+live stream events into a StreamEditor, finalising with the aggregated text (chunk 21, D-026).

type-StreamingDelivery.PURPOSE: Protocol for the slow-path race+stream wrapper

CrossLink.relation: VoiceHandler for STT staging — voice, audio and video_note all route to on_voice
PhotoIngestor; photos run Claude vision via the wiki pipeline (media_paths)
reads Settings (tokens, db urls, users_toml_path, media_staging_root, voice_*, photo_*)
register_media_staging_sweep_job on the scheduler + promote_path_to_raw after a successful Stage-1 run (D-022)
syncs users.toml snapshot to sessions.users table
SQLAlchemyJobStore on jobs.db; move_to_dlq writes jobs_dlq
assemble_prompt + restricted env/cwd for the `claude` subprocess
WikiLockAdapter wraps WikiLockManager; kill_with_sequence on timeout
acquires the WIKI lock during create/migrate
L1 tg_updates + L2 seen_files / dedup_hits tables
register_db_snapshot_job adds the daily 03:00 UTC VACUUM INTO job
OutputDelivery Protocol → deliver_output(); ConfirmationService.request_explicit + build_route_confirm_keyboard for the Inbox-WIKI route confirm loop (aisw-e45)
Router Protocol returns RouterDecision; RouterError → safe ack (aisw-dsg)
_RouterAdapter parses run_wiki_session reply via parse_router_reply; raises RouterError (aisw-dsg)
_RouterAdapter calls ensure_inbox_wiki before each Stage-1a router run (aisw-dsg)
Librarian Protocol returns IngestOutcome for ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI decisions (aisw-zd9); route_action_to_payload/route_action_from_payload (de)serialise the confirm-loop draft (aisw-e45)
consumes on_event stream callback from run_wiki_session
